name: repo-setup
description: Set up a new or cloned repository for local development.

interface.shortDescription: Set up a new or cloned repository for local development. Use when the user asks to scaffold a new project, bootstrap a repo, set up local de
interface.longDescription: Set up a new or cloned repository for local development. Use when the user asks to scaffold a new project, bootstrap a repo, set up local dev environment, configure local domains/proxy, or get a project running locally.
